untranslatable_reason: The core signal relies on subjective 'tape reading quality score' (60% threshold) and 'instinct signal confirmed by secondary pattern' which cannot be operationalized with the available indicators. These require real-time market microstructure analysis and trader intuition that fall outside quantifiable technical indicators. Used proxies (price_pos_20 for positioning, vol_ratio_20 for volume confirmation, pivot levels for support/resistance) but the signal's essential tape-reading methodology is not translatable.
translation_notes: Mapped 'attentiveness indicator (tape reading quality score) >= 60%' to price_pos_20 >= 0.6 as a proxy for price positioning relative to recent range. Used pivot points (s1/r1) as mechanical proxies for support/resistance levels. Vol_ratio_20 > 1.0 substitutes for 'volume confirmation'. Max loss of 3.5% aligns with stated risk parameter. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT since signal can trade both long and short depending on which level is approached.
